title: 7 Best Klaviyo Alternatives in 2025 (Free & Paid)
meta_description: Find the best Klaviyo alternatives for email marketing. Compare pricing, features & reviews of top tools for e-commerce & small business.
intro: While Klaviyo excels at e-commerce email automation, it may not be the best fit for every business—whether due to pricing, feature set, or specific use case requirements. We've compiled the top alternatives that deliver powerful email marketing, automation, and customer engagement tools across different industries and budgets.
why_switch: Lower pricing tiers better suited for small businesses and startups
Specialized features for creators, publishers, or service-based businesses
Simpler interface and faster onboarding for non-technical teams
Better value proposition if you don't need advanced e-commerce integrations

alternatives.name: MailerLite
alternatives.tagline: Simple email marketing for small businesses
alternatives.best_for: small businesses and freelancers on a budget
alternatives.key_difference: MailerLite offers an excellent balance of affordability and functionality, starting at just $9/month with up to 1,000 free subscribers. It includes automation, landing pages, and e-commerce integrations without the premium pricing of Klaviyo, making it ideal for growing businesses that don't require advanced predictive analytics.

alternatives.name: ActiveCampaign
alternatives.best_for: businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
alternatives.key_difference: ActiveCampaign combines email, CRM, and advanced automation in a single platform with robust lead scoring and site tracking capabilities. Unlike Klaviyo's e-commerce focus, it's purpose-built for B2B and service businesses that need sophisticated customer relationship management alongside marketing automation.

alternatives.name: ConvertKit
alternatives.key_difference: ConvertKit specializes in serving digital creators with built-in landing pages, subscriber tagging, and commerce features designed specifically for course sales and content monetization. It offers a more generous free tier (1,000 subscribers) and simpler automation than Klaviyo, making it perfect for independent creators.

alternatives.name: Beehiiv
alternatives.tagline: The newsletter platform built for growth
alternatives.key_difference: Beehiiv is purpose-built for newsletter publishers with monetization features, an ad network, and referral programs that Klaviyo doesn't offer. It provides the largest free tier (2,500 subscribers) and exceptional customer reviews, making it the top choice for media operators and newsletter-focused businesses.

alternatives.name: Mailchimp
alternatives.key_difference: Mailchimp is one of the most beginner-friendly email platforms with a powerful free tier and drag-and-drop editor that requires no coding knowledge. It's ideal for small businesses just starting with email marketing who want simplicity over advanced e-commerce features like Klaviyo provides.

alternatives.name: Brevo
alternatives.key_difference: Brevo stands out with an exceptional free tier (up to 100,000 contacts) and multi-channel capabilities including SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat alongside email. It's the best choice for businesses needing transactional email APIs and omnichannel marketing without the premium Klaviyo pricing.

alternatives.name: GetResponse
alternatives.best_for: online course creators and webinar hosts
alternatives.key_difference: GetResponse uniquely combines email marketing with native webinar hosting, online course functionality, and conversion funnel tools that Klaviyo lacks. It's the ideal alternative for course creators and digital entrepreneurs who want an integrated platform for both marketing and product delivery.

faq.q: What is the best free alternative to Klaviyo?
faq.a: Brevo offers the most generous free tier with up to 100,000 contacts and includes email, SMS, WhatsApp, and CRM features. If you need a more e-commerce focused alternative, MailerLite and Beehiiv both offer excellent free plans with 1,000-2,500 subscribers respectively, along with core automation and landing page features.

faq.q: What is the best Klaviyo alternative for small business?
faq.a: MailerLite is the best overall choice for small businesses, starting at just $9/month with excellent automation, landing pages, and e-commerce integrations at a fraction of Klaviyo's cost. For businesses that need CRM functionality alongside email, ActiveCampaign offers comprehensive automation and customer management starting at $15/month.

faq.q: Is there a cheaper alternative to Klaviyo?
faq.a: Yes, several alternatives offer significantly lower pricing. MailerLite starts at $9/month, GetResponse at $19/month, and Brevo at $25/month—all substantially less than Klaviyo's $45 starting price. For budget-conscious businesses, Brevo's free tier with unlimited contacts is the most cost-effective option available.
